docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RICARDO HERRERA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, PEDRO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS RECEIVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HERRERA, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED NOV-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, PEDRO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUIZ, PEDRO HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUIZ, PEDRO
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL - "NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL" TO RICARDO HERRERA BACK FROM POST OFFICE WITH UNABLE TO FORWARD, INSUFFICIANT ADDRESS, & RETURN TO SENDER
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-23-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HERRERA, RICARDO TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT RUIZ, PEDRO PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY RUIZ, PEDRO HERRERA, RICARDO
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT RUIZ, PEDRO MAILED TO RESPONDENT HERRERA, RICARDO
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-23-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/20/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PEDRO RUIZ ON JAN-20-2017 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF RICHARDO HERRERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDA PEDRO RUIZ IS PRESENT WITH COURT APPOINTED INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLAN-REA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2017 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. APPELLANT PEDRO RUIZ DOES NOT OWE RESPONDENT RICARDO HERRERA ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DECEMBER-08-2016. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:00AM: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY IN DEPT. 525 FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL WITH THE COURT, BOTH PARTIES APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA, AND THE COURTROOM STAFF PRESENT. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH; THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND ACCEPTS AND VIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN THE CAUSE THAT ARE INTRODUCED BY BOTH PARTIES.

AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER READING AND REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELLE BRANT; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; (NOT REPORTED) (DEPT. 525).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Judgment Entered
